description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow set on a large rectangular green plot, featuring a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The structure is primarily white, with expansive windows and a spacious open-plan layout visible from the exterior. A distinctive feature is the organically shaped swimming pool located in the yard, connected to the house by a paved pathway. The property includes a driveway leading to the main entrance and a small cluster of trees providing shade near the rear. The outdoor area is open and uncluttered, emphasizing minimalism and integration with the landscape. The overall design suggests a contemporary architectural style with an emphasis on outdoor living and natural light.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and an organic-shaped pool on a spacious green plot. The design is minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on outdoor integration.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and the pool prominently in the foreground.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, large windows, and the cluster of trees at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view with the trees in the foreground and a clear look at the back facade and open yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, pathway, and the house's geometric structure.
